rejectedObservations.observation: Historical note: before the direct-cli alignment feature landed, `skills/search-paper` still documented wrapper-mediated runtime config through `SEARCH_PAPER_ENV_FILE` and a skill-local `.env`, which conflicted with the global-config/direct-CLI runtime contract.
rejectedObservations.reason: already-planned in pending feature direct-cli-skill-release-alignment rather than a new scrutiny guidance update for this milestone
